channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: Curious where jazz can go beyond familiar scales? Check out …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Curious where jazz can go beyond familiar scales? Check out these essential albums from the vibrant world of microtonal jazz, where alternative tunings open entirely new sonic possibilities.
item.content:encoded: Curious where jazz can go beyond familiar scales? Check out these essential albums from the vibrant world of microtonal jazz, where alternative tunings open entirely new sonic possibilities.

item.title: 今海沿いの温泉にある食堂にいるんだけど、高齢の女性団体客が隣のテーブルで「幸せだね」「幸せすぎる」「明日も幸せだね」「今…
item.author: katokich (@katokich.bsky.social)
item.description: 今海沿いの温泉にある食堂にいるんだけど、高齢の女性団体客が隣のテーブルで「幸せだね」「幸せすぎる」「明日も幸せだね」「今度いつ来る」とニコニコしながらおにぎり食べてて最高すぎる
item.content:encoded: 今海沿いの温泉にある食堂にいるんだけど、高齢の女性団体客が隣のテーブルで「幸せだね」「幸せすぎる」「明日も幸せだね」「今度いつ来る」とニコニコしながらおにぎり食べてて最高すぎる

item.title: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than …
item.author: TechCrunch (@techcrunch.com)
item.description: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.

item.title: Morocco was no match for France, which lost 2-0. The French,…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Morocco was no match for France, which lost 2-0. The French, one of the pre-tournament favorites, move on to the World Cup semifinals against either Spain or Belgium.
item.content:encoded: Morocco was no match for France, which lost 2-0. The French, one of the pre-tournament favorites, move on to the World Cup semifinals against either Spain or Belgium.

item.title: Codex just rebranded to ChatGPT. Claude is spamming me with …
item.author: Theo - t3.gg {bot} (@theo-t3gg.bsky.social)
item.description:
Codex just rebranded to ChatGPT. Claude is spamming me with Excel plugins. xAI is bragging about how good Grok is at PowerPoint.

I knew the "ai labs focus 100% of their effort on software devs" thing wouldn't last, but it's sad having it end all at once.
item.content:encoded:
Codex just rebranded to ChatGPT. Claude is spamming me with Excel plugins. xAI is bragging about how good Grok is at PowerPoint.

I knew the "ai labs focus 100% of their effort on software devs" thing wouldn't last, but it's sad having it end all at once.

item.title: The House’s Epstein investigation will hit the one-year mark…
item.author: Politico (@politico.com)
item.description:
The House’s Epstein investigation will hit the one-year mark later this month, and the saga isn’t ending anytime soon.

🔗 politi.co/4h3mC0z
item.content:encoded:
The House’s Epstein investigation will hit the one-year mark later this month, and the saga isn’t ending anytime soon.

item.title: Springer Nature has reversed the more than decade-old retrac…
item.author: Science Magazine (@science.org)
item.description: Springer Nature has reversed the more than decade-old retraction of two papers by legendary physicist and Nobel laureate Max Planck, saying the initial action was based on human error. https://scim.ag/3TouJuS
item.content:encoded: Springer Nature has reversed the more than decade-old retraction of two papers by legendary physicist and Nobel laureate Max Planck, saying the initial action was based on human error. https://scim.ag/3TouJuS

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: France dominated Morocco 2-…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: France dominated Morocco 2-0 at the World Cup quarterfinals thanks to second-half goals from Kylian Mbappe and Ousmane Dembele. "It may be time to accept the inevitable: Les Bleus look destined to win this tournament." nyti.ms/4yfkDN1
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: France dominated Morocco 2-0 at the World Cup quarterfinals thanks to second-half goals from Kylian Mbappe and Ousmane Dembele. "It may be time to accept the inevitable: Les Bleus look destined to win this tournament." nyti.ms/4yfkDN1

item.content:encoded: This is Oreo. He will eventually eat the blueberry. But first he must establish dominance over it. 12/10 (TT: oreominibernedoodle)

item.title: NEW: None of the officers at the scene where a man was fatal…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: NEW: None of the officers at the scene where a man was fatally shot by ICE in Houston were wearing body cameras, according to two DHS officials and a source familiar with the investigation.
item.content:encoded: NEW: None of the officers at the scene where a man was fatally shot by ICE in Houston were wearing body cameras, according to two DHS officials and a source familiar with the investigation.

item.title: I’ve been reading The Hobbit to my son (9) every night for t…
item.author: Maria J Pérez Cuervo (@mjpcuervo.com)
item.description: I’ve been reading The Hobbit to my son (9) every night for the last few weeks. We finished it last night. His verdict: “This is probably one of the best books I’ve ever read.”
item.content:encoded: I’ve been reading The Hobbit to my son (9) every night for the last few weeks. We finished it last night. His verdict: “This is probably one of the best books I’ve ever read.”

item.title: "O que falta pro Mbappé superar o Neymar?" Falta uma máquin…
item.author: Fernando (@punkbiology.bsky.social)
item.description:
"O que falta pro Mbappé superar o Neymar?"

Falta uma máquina do tempo pra ele poder voltar lá pra 2018, quando ainda não tinha superado, e então superar.
item.content:encoded:
"O que falta pro Mbappé superar o Neymar?"

Falta uma máquina do tempo pra ele poder voltar lá pra 2018, quando ainda não tinha superado, e então superar.

item.title: Dozens of Black-Veined White butterflies (Aporia crataeai) s…
item.author: Acid Rain (@bearysweet.bsky.social)
item.description:
Dozens of Black-Veined White butterflies (Aporia crataeai) swarm a kayak by the Vagran River in the Ural Mountains of Russia.

🦋

The butterflies are attracted to the salt from human sweat on the kayaker's gear and clothing.

This happens in early summer when these butterflies emerge.

#butterfly
item.content:encoded:
Dozens of Black-Veined White butterflies (Aporia crataeai) swarm a kayak by the Vagran River in the Ural Mountains of Russia.

🦋

The butterflies are attracted to the salt from human sweat on the kayaker's gear and clothing.

This happens in early summer when these butterflies emerge.

#butterfly

item.title: WNBA All-Star weekend 2026 is adding a historic new venue. …
item.author: leftylady.bsky.social (@leftylady.bsky.social)
item.description:
WNBA All-Star weekend 2026 is adding a historic new venue.

Several WNBA All-Star events and activities will take place at the newly opened Obama Presidential Center, making the league the first professional sports league to host programming at the historic Chicago venue.

(via WNBA)
item.content:encoded:
WNBA All-Star weekend 2026 is adding a historic new venue.

Several WNBA All-Star events and activities will take place at the newly opened Obama Presidential Center, making the league the first professional sports league to host programming at the historic Chicago venue.

(via WNBA)

item.title: Bonnie Tyler, the Grammy-nominated Welsh pop star behind the…
item.author: The Washington Post (@washingtonpost.com)
item.description:
Bonnie Tyler, the Grammy-nominated Welsh pop star behind the 1983 chart-topping power ballad “Total Eclipse of the Heart,” has died.

Tyler died unexpectedly while being treated for an illness, her family said. wapo.st/4bxEQUm
item.content:encoded:
Bonnie Tyler, the Grammy-nominated Welsh pop star behind the 1983 chart-topping power ballad “Total Eclipse of the Heart,” has died.

Tyler died unexpectedly while being treated for an illness, her family said. wapo.st/4bxEQUm

item.title: Tolkien wrote a YA novel where the villain was Smaug, an evi…
item.author: Jonathan W. Gray (@elmcitytree.blacksky.app)
item.description: Tolkien wrote a YA novel where the villain was Smaug, an evil dragon that hoarded wealth & polluted the earth. Everyone working in tech who loves that book & that author has missed its point. These are also the same people who assert that thinking about literature is a waste of time. 🤬🤬
item.content:encoded: Tolkien wrote a YA novel where the villain was Smaug, an evil dragon that hoarded wealth & polluted the earth. Everyone working in tech who loves that book & that author has missed its point. These are also the same people who assert that thinking about literature is a waste of time. 🤬🤬

item.title: I woke up grateful this morning. It’s a good feeling to have…
item.author: Gabby (@gabbydp.bsky.social)
item.description:
I woke up grateful this morning. It’s a good feeling to have. With all the chaos and unpleasant aspects of our world, it’s nice to just feel some gratitude for the small things. She’s a big beautiful complicated planet 🌲☀️🌎🌍☀️🌲

I hope you all have the day you wish for 🩵✌️

#trees #forest #nature
item.content:encoded:
I woke up grateful this morning. It’s a good feeling to have. With all the chaos and unpleasant aspects of our world, it’s nice to just feel some gratitude for the small things. She’s a big beautiful complicated planet 🌲☀️🌎🌍☀️🌲

I hope you all have the day you wish for 🩵✌️

#trees #forest #nature

item.title: We’re not crying, you’re crying Guillermo Ochoa staying beh…
item.author: First Touch (@firsttouch.bsky.social)
item.description:
We’re not crying, you’re crying

Guillermo Ochoa staying behind the final training session at the Azteca to hang up six pairs of gloves

Each glove represents a World Cup he has played at for Mexico 🇲🇽

A legend.
item.content:encoded:
We’re not crying, you’re crying

Guillermo Ochoa staying behind the final training session at the Azteca to hang up six pairs of gloves

Each glove represents a World Cup he has played at for Mexico 🇲🇽

A legend.
